Local-only beta Launch TeacherTools
TeacherTools AI-powered Browser-based

AI-powered reporting tools for math teachers.

Generate report card comments in bulk, scan handwritten assignment scores with your phone camera, build seating plans, and track parent calls — all running locally in your browser with no account required.

What's new
AI Comments Bulk & advanced editor
Marking Assistant OCR score scanning
Seating Plan AI class layouts
Launch TeacherTools See the toolkit

Everything a math teacher needs at report time

Six integrated tools that work together — from raw marks to printed report cards.

Data

Upload class rosters and mark sheets. Rename headers, filter rows, sort columns, and export without losing context between classes.

  • CSV & XLSX upload with folder support
  • Persistent header renames and column sorting
  • Export filtered views to CSV or XLSX

Report Comments

Generate polished report card comments using AI — in bulk for all students or one at a time with full control over tone and details.

  • Bulk AI generator for entire class
  • Advanced per-student editor with performance guidance
  • Refine any comment with a single click

Marking Assistant

Point your phone at a student's assignment page and the app reads the name and score in about two seconds — no typing required.

  • Camera or file upload scanning
  • Results accumulate in an editable table
  • Download as a class CSV instantly

Phone Logs

Log parent and guardian calls directly alongside your class data. See underperforming students at a glance with colour-coded grade indicators.

  • Per-student call date, time, and notes
  • Underperforming students panel (≤60%)
  • Alphabetical list with mark-level colour coding

Print View

Generate print-ready attendance sheets, marking sheets, and drill sheets — individually or all at once for the selected class.

  • Attendance, marking, and drill templates
  • Print all templates with one click
  • Column selection overlay for marking sheets

Seating Plan

Describe your classroom layout and constraints, and let the AI arrange students by performance level, keeping your high and low performers balanced.

  • Freeform layout and constraint input
  • AI-generated arrangements with performance grouping
  • Animated reveal, print-ready output

From marks to report cards in minutes

Load your class files once — every tool stays in sync across your students.

Workflow

Upload once, use everywhere

Drop in your CSV or XLSX roster. Every tab — comments, phone logs, seating plan, print view — reads from the same data. Change a mark and the whole tool updates.

AI features

Gemini-powered, privacy-first

AI comment generation and OCR scanning run through the Gemini API. Your student data is never stored on any server — it lives in your browser until you close the tab.

Comments Bulk + advanced
Scanning ~2 sec per page
Storage Browser only

What's working in real classrooms

Feedback from teachers using TeacherTools for rosters, marks, and report comments.

JR

"I stopped juggling five tabs to print reports."

Grade 7 Math
SL

"Bulk comment generation saved me an entire evening."

Primary Math
PD

"The Marking Assistant is the feature I didn't know I needed."

Program Director

What happens to my data?

Files are processed locally in your browser. The only external calls are to the Gemini API for AI features — no student names or marks are stored on any server we operate.

Ready to try it?

Hit "Launch TeacherTools" — no account, no install. Just upload a CSV and go.
